tags.name: Transactions
tags.description: Operations for deposits, withdrawals, and transaction history

tags.name: Transfers
tags.description: Endpoints for money transfers between accounts

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: User registration, login, and password management

put.description: Rejects the KYC verification for a customer. Only accessible by ADMIN.

403.description: Role not authorized for this operation

put.description: Approves the KYC verification for a customer. Only accessible by ADMIN.

403.description: Role not authorized for this operation

get.description: Retrieves the customer profile for the authenticated user.

404.description: Customer profile not found for this user

put.description: Updates the authenticated customer's personal data. All fields are optional; only provided fields are updated. Name changes (firstName + lastName) reset KYC status to PENDING.
Changes the password for the authenticated user. Requires current password verification.

401.description: Invalid or expired JWT token, or incorrect current password

put.description: Enables or disables two-factor authentication for the authenticated user.

post.description: Transfers money from one account to another using the destination account's alias or account number. Exactly one of 'toAlias' or 'toAccountNumber' must be provided. Validates sufficient funds, active accounts, and currency compatibility.

403.description: Role not authorized for this operation

404.description: Source or target account not found

422.description: Business rule violation (insufficient funds, inactive account, same account transfer, or currency mismatch)

post.description: Withdraws money from the specified bank account. Validates sufficient funds, active account status, and KYC approval.

403.description: Account does not belong to the authenticated user

422.description: Business rule violation (insufficient funds, inactive account, KYC not approved, or currency mismatch)

post.description: Deposits money into the specified bank account. The authenticated user must be the account owner and have approved KYC status.

403.description: Account does not belong to the authenticated user

422.description: Business rule violation (inactive account, KYC not approved, or currency mismatch)

post.description: Verifies a user's email address using the token sent during registration.

422.description: Invalid or expired verification token or user already verified

post.description: Resends the email verification link to the user's email address.
Creates a new user account with email and password. Also creates associated customer profile.
Authenticates user with email and password. Returns JWT token on success.
Verifies the 2FA code and returns JWT token on success. Use the session token received from login response.
Creates a new bank account for the authenticated user. Requires KYC approval. Only one USD account is allowed per customer.

403.description: Role not authorized for this operation

422.description: KYC not approved or USD account limit reached

get.description: Retrieves the details of any money transfer by its ID. Only accessible by ADMIN or authorized roles.

403.description: Role not authorized for this operation

get.description: Retrieves the details of a specific money transfer by its ID. Only returns transfers where the authenticated user is the sender or recipient.

403.description: Transfer does not belong to the authenticated user

get.description: Retrieves the details of a specific transaction by its ID. Only returns transactions where the authenticated user is the account owner.

403.description: Transaction does not belong to the authenticated user

get.description: Retrieves the paginated transaction history only for the user.

403.description: Authenticated user not authorized to view these transactions

get.description: Retrieves the paginated transaction history for the specified account. Only the account owner can access this information.

parameters.name: accountId
parameters.description: Account ID to retrieve transactions from

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

403.description: Account does not belong to the authenticated user

get.description: Retrieves a paginated list of all customers. Only accessible by ADMIN or BRANCH_MANAGER.

parameters.name: size
parameters.description: The size of the page to be returned

parameters.name: sort
parameters.description: Sorting criteria in the format: property,(asc|desc). Default sort order is ascending. Multiple sort criteria are supported.

403.description: Role not authorized for this operation

get.description: Retrieves a specific customer by their ID. Only accessible by ADMIN or BRANCH_MANAGER.

403.description: Role not authorized for this operation

get.description: Returns whether 2FA is enabled for the authenticated user.
Retrieves any bank account by ID. Only accessible by ADMIN or authorized roles.

403.description: Role not authorized for this operation

get.description: Retrieves the list of available bank account types.
Searches for a bank account by its alias. Returns public information only (alias, owner name, currency, account type).

404.description: Account not found for the given alias

get.description: Retrieves all bank accounts for the authenticated user.

404.description: Customer profile not found for this user

get.description: Retrieves a specific bank account by ID for the authenticated user. Only returns accounts owned by the user.

403.description: Account does not belong to the authenticated user

get.description: Retrieves the balance of a specific account owned by the authenticated user.

403.description: Account does not belong to the authenticated user
